function.message: I can’t determine a unique start date for a project named “NORA-at-home” from the workspace. No file contains that project name, and there are multiple Nora-linked projects (Hearthline, House Mesh, Northstar Ledger). Please provide the exact project folder/title so I can return a single YYYY-MM-DD date.
